Understanding Eating Disorders:
Eating disorders are complex conditions that involve a distorted body image and unhealthy eating habits. There are three main types of eating disorders: anorexia nervosa, bulimia nervosa, and binge eating disorder. Each of these disorders has its own unique causes and risk factors, but they all share a common thread: a negative relationship with food and body. * Supporting others and creating a supportive environment: Supporting others and creating a supportive environment can help prevent eating disorders. This can involve promoting positive body image and self-esteem, and providing support and resources for those who are struggling.
